name: 3D Filamental Graph

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## v2.1.0 — Bug fixes

### Fixed

- **Pan direction**: trackpad two-finger pan was inverted, now moves naturally
- **Zoom direction**: Ctrl+scroll zoom was inverted, now scrolling up zooms in
- **Arrow keys**: no longer require a Ctrl modifier to pan the graph
- **Open in Filamental**: writes vault path directly to Filamental settings and launches the app, bypassing unreliable deep-link/registry approaches on Windows

---

Filamental desktop app: [filamental.space](https://filamental.space)
releases.name: 3D Filamental Graph v2.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 3D Filamental Graph v2.0.0

The plugin has been completely rebuilt. v2.0.0 brings the full 3D graph engine *inside* Obsidian as a native leaf view.

### What's new

**Live 3D graph inside Obsidian**
Your entire vault renders as a 3D knowledge graph in a native Obsidian tab. No external window, no import, no export. Your markdown files are the data source.

**Physics simulation**
Nodes repel each other and spring toward their connections. The simulation settles naturally, grouping related notes into clusters. Drag any node to reposition it permanently.

**Type-coloured nodes**
If you use Filamental entity types, every node is coloured by type. Node size scales with connection count, so the most-connected notes are always visible.

**Shared positions with the desktop app**
Node positions are saved to `.filamental/positions.json` in your vault. Open the same vault in Filamental desktop and the layout carries over exactly.

**Full keyboard + trackpad navigation**
Arrow keys pan. Ctrl+scroll zooms. Trackpad two-finger swipe pans naturally. Click any node to open that note in Obsidian.

**Open in Filamental**
One button launches the Filamental desktop app with your vault already loaded.

---

Filamental desktop app: [filamental.space](https://filamental.space)
releases.name: 3D Filamental Graph v2.0.0

releases.author: Scottnine
releases.description:
Initial release — view your project vault in 3D using Filamental.

## What this plugin does

- Ribbon button and command to open your Obsidian vault in Filamental
- Sidebar panel shows each note's entity type, connection count, and linked notes
- Status bar displays entity type and connection count for Filamental nodes
- Notes stay in sync automatically — both apps read and write the same markdown files

## Requirements

Filamental desktop app — free forever for one project vault, Pro for professional and commercial use. filamental.space
